title: Mildly Smoky Japanese Turkey Mince Casserole
description: A smoky and chewy Japanese-inspired casserole featuring turkey mince, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is vegetarian-friendly and cooked to perfection in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the turkey mince and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink.
Add the smoked paprika, soy sauce, mirin, and sake, and stir to combine.
Add the green beans and cook until they are tender.
Transfer the mixture to a terracotta dish and drizzle with teriyaki sauce.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
